title: Amtech F1000 13 Piece high speed steel (HSS) drill set - small
features: DURABLE: These drill bits are made from high speed steel (HSS) and are ideal for metal drilling
HANDY STORAGE BOX: The set includes assorted sizes between 1.5mm - 6.5mm and is supplied in handy plastic storage case
SIZE CAPACITY: 5 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 13x Drill See more
